prompt_text: June.so vs PostHog pricing and features
response:
# June.so vs PostHog Comparison

## Pricing

| Aspect | June.so | PostHog |
|--------|---------|---------|
| **Model** | Usage-based (events) | Usage-based (events) + Product Tiers |
| **Free Tier** | Up to 100K events/month | Up to 1M events/month |
| **Typical Cost** | $29-$299/month | $20-$20K+/month |
| **Self-Hosted** | Limited | ✅ Full support |

## Feature Comparison

### Analytics & Tracking
| Feature | June.so | PostHog |
|---------|---------|---------|
| Event tracking | ✅ | ✅ |
| User segmentation | ✅ | ✅ |
| Custom dashboards | ✅ | ✅ |
| Funnel analysis | ✅ | ✅ |
| Cohorts | ✅ | ✅ |

### Advanced Features
| Feature | June.so | PostHog |
|---------|---------|---------|
| **Session Recording** | Basic | ✅ Advanced |
| **A/B Testing** | Limited | ✅ Full suite |
| **Feature Flags** | ✅ | ✅ Advanced |
| **Heatmaps** | ❌ | ✅ |
| **Data Warehouse** | ❌ | ✅ |

## Key Differences

**June.so Strengths:**
- Simpler, more affordable for small teams
- Focus on product analytics essentials
- Easier onboarding
- Better pricing for low-event volumes

**PostHog Strengths:**
- All-in-one platform (analytics + experiments + feature flags)
- More powerful session recording
- Advanced A/B testing
- Self-hosted options
- Data warehouse integration
- Better for enterprises

## Best For

- **June.so**: Early-stage startups, simple analytics needs, budget-conscious teams
- **PostHog**: Growing companies, full experimentation stacks, enterprises needing self-hosting

Would you like me to dive deeper into any specific feature?
